messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Don't got none, don't want none!
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: You're too stinking poor to afford it.
messages.buy_succeeds: That'll be %d coins and your firstborn child please!
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: You don't seem to have one of those.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I don't want anything of yours.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: I don't sell any of those!
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Go buy something you can afford.
messages.buy_succeeds: That comes to %d coins. Now get lost! Heheh.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: Nothing is refundable, have a nice day.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Nothing is refundable, have a nice day.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Nothing is refundable, have a nice day.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: I offer no such thing! Try list.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: You can't afford to purchase this!
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: You lack the item in question.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: The price of this is beyond my means.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I buy the tools of magicians only.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: I never palmed that thing, try list.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: You beggar! You can't afford that.
messages.buy_succeeds: Here ye go, pal. That'll be %d coins.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: That seems to be absent from your belongings.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: How about if I just steal it instead?
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I don't buy, I accept charity. Fork it over!

messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: You'll need more gold than that!
messages.buy_succeeds: Good choice, my pretty! %d coins please.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: Even if you had one of those, I doubt I would want it.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: I'd buy it, but I just fed my dragon and am broke!
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I don't need to buy those - I'm a witch! Muaha!
messages.sell_succeeds: Ahh! Just the thing I needed. Have %d coins.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: I do not forge that weapon, try list.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: You haven't the means to pay for this.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: You seem fresh out of those.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Ah! I haven't seen the like of that in years! I cannot afford it.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: My art is purely offensive. Try somewhere else.
messages.sell_succeeds: Here you are, %d coins. Now be off.

messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: That seems to be out of your price range.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: Hm. Smoke another one and check your inventory.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: The price for that is outrageous! Away with you.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I'm not interested in such things.
messages.sell_succeeds: I'll give you %d coins for that.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: You'll have to make that yourself, never heard of it.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: You can't afford my hearty drink and meals!
messages.buy_succeeds: A solid %d coins down on the bar, friend.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: You don't seem to have one.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Be on your way loafer, I don't buy.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: None of those here! Try list.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I'd rather eat half-cooked chihuahua for a month than buy that.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Yo! Um, we don't sell that.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: You haven't enough gold for it.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: We don't buy, and you have none. I see a problem there.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I don't want for anything. Be on your way, peddler.
